title: Laceration during rebar tying – first aid only
description: Ironworker laborer sustained a minor laceration to right hand while tying rebar at Level 2 deck of Gate Area B. Worker was not wearing cut-resistant gloves as required by task hazard analysis. First aid applied on site. Worker returned to full duty after treatment. Corrective action: re-issued cut-resistant gloves to entire rebar crew and conducted impromptu toolbox talk on PPE compliance.
location: MSP North Terminal – Level 2 Gate Area B Deck

title: Near miss – crane load swing over occupied area
description: During a structural steel pick at roof level Gridline C
incident_type: the crane operator allowed the load to swing over a partially occupied work area. No workers were struck. Work was stopped immediately and an exclusion zone was re-established. Operator was retrained on load path planning.
osha_recordable: MSP North Terminal – Roof Level Gridline C
